test.notes: 24 worldview tests pass (17 store + 7 service). Full suite not run due to known ENOSPC issues with heavy jsdom test suites.

lint.notes: 695 total errors (694 pre-existing + 1 new). The 1 new error is in supabase/functions/worldlabs-proxy/index.ts:18 — uses @ts-ignore instead of @ts-expect-error. Non-blocking, consistent with existing edge function patterns.

nonBlockingIssues.description: captureTake accepts 'resolution' parameter but never uses it — unused function parameter.
setWorldGenerating is a no-op — declared in interface but does nothing. May mislead consumers.
Raw WorldLabs error text forwarded to clients. safeErrorResponse exists but not used.
Service method behavior not tested beyond signatures — no mocked supabase.functions.invoke tests.
pollOperation lacks AbortController support for cancellation on component unmount.
buildRequestForStudio() lacks a 'worldview' case in switch — returns undefined if called with worldview studio.
fetchKanvasModels called for 'worldview' studio unnecessarily during page load. Result discarded.
Image file from WorldCreatorPanel is accepted in UI but never forwarded to the API service. Image prompt mode is partially functional.
Bottom prompt bar input is purely decorative scaffolding with no onChange handler or state.
handleRetryGeneration only clears error state, does not actually re-invoke generation. Naming is misleading.
worldlabs-proxy/index.ts:18 uses @ts-ignore instead of @ts-expect-error, adding 1 new lint error to the codebase.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add exception to worldview-worker skill TDD procedure for greenfield/foundation features: when creating new files from scratch where types/store don't exist yet, implementation-first with tests-after is acceptable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: worldview-foundation worker noted the 'Write Tests First (Red Phase)' step is impractical for greenfield foundation features. Worker correctly deviated and wrote tests after implementation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add cross-cutting integration note: when adding a new studio to KanvasStudio type union and KANVAS_STUDIO_ORDER, workers must also check buildRequestForStudio() in helpers.ts and the fetchKanvasModels() loop in KanvasPage.tsx. Studios that don't use Kanvas models should either be filtered from the fetch loop or have a no-op case in buildRequestForStudio.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: worldview-studio-ui added 'worldview' to KANVAS_STUDIO_ORDER which triggered an unnecessary fetchKanvasModels API call at page load (KanvasPage.tsx:750). buildRequestForStudio() also lacks a worldview case, returning undefined if called. Both are non-blocking but are maintenance hazards for future studios.

rejectedObservations.observation: The setWorldGenerating no-op pattern should be documented in AGENTS.md as a convention.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a single instance, not a general pattern. The no-op is adequately explained by the inline code comment. Documenting it as a convention would over-generalize from one case.

rejectedObservations.observation: WorldLabs API response shapes should be added to .factory/library/.
rejectedObservations.reason: The response shapes are inferred by the worker and not verified against official API documentation. Adding unverified schemas to the library could be misleading. The types in src/types/worldview.ts already serve as the de facto response shape documentation.
